name: lexpack
description: Controlled Chrome and Chromium-Gost builds of the LexPack extension.

scripts.check:syntax: find extension scripts test -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.cjs' -o -name '*.mjs' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.check:manifest: npm run build && node scripts/check-builds.mjs all
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:browser
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:manifest && npm test
